title: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS launch CMO AI Hub
detailed_summary: Infosys announced the launch of the CMO AI Hub in collaboration with ANA's Global CMO Growth Council and LIONS. The platform, developed by Infosys Aster, is an AI-powered, member-exclusive peer learning and collaboration hub for Chief Marketing Officers. It uses curated intelligence from ANA, LIONS, and the Infosys Knowledge Institute through a secure conversational interface, with governance safeguards and privacy-by-design principles. The launch also accompanies the CMO AI Playbook developed by the Infosys Knowledge Institute.

key_facts.fact: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS announced the launch of the CMO AI Hub on June 24, 2026.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS Unveil the CMO AI Hub

key_facts.fact: The CMO AI Hub was developed by Infosys Aster, an AI-amplified marketing suite.

key_facts.fact: The platform is built exclusively for members of ANA's Global CMO Growth Council.

key_facts.fact: The hub combines curated intelligence from ANA, LIONS, and the Infosys Knowledge Institute into a secure conversational interface for senior marketing leaders.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS Unveil the CMO AI Hub

key_facts.fact: The launch accompanies the CMO AI Playbook, developed by the Infosys Knowledge Institute based on research including one-on-one interviews with CMOs, engagement with marketing leaders across global industry events, and inputs from ANA members.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in AI-first business consulting  and  technology  services,  in  collaboration  with  ANA's  Global  CMO  Growth  Council,  global leadership body driving growth for marketers, and LIONS, the parent platform and organizer of the Cannes Lions International Festival of Creativity, today announced the launch of the CMO AI Hub.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS Unveil the CMO AI Hub
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main launch event and identifies the parties involved.

important_text_spans.text: Developed by Infosys Aster, an AI-amplified marketing suite, the hub brings together curated intelligence from Association of National Advertisers (ANA), LIONS, and the Infosys Knowledge Institute, the research arm  of  Infosys,  into  a  secure,  conversational  interface  tailored  for  senior  marketing  leaders.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS Unveil the CMO AI Hub
important_text_spans.reason: Supports Infosys product involvement and the platform's core purpose.

important_text_spans.text: Built  exclusively  for  members of ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, the hub transforms the collective intelligence of the marketing industry into an always-available resource.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS Unveil the CMO AI Hub
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the target user base and positioning of the platform.
